text: 0.3g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: excellent swap for sugary drinks. the raw nutrition is tiny, but the replacement value is very real. clear real-world role. if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. use case can matter more than macros. this category is really about function and trade-offs.

on the weaker side: caffeine still needs managing. useful, but not free of trade-offs. not a whole-food nutrition star. most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile. easy to overrate or misuse. this category attracts strong marketing and habits.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
